race.description: Scenic Rim Clydesdale Spectacular Festival 2027 Hcp (Bm60)
race.comment: DESTINYS SUMMIT (1) began awkwardly then worked home fairly when resuming over 1100m at Ipswich last time out. Down in class and is a winner here at this distance. Likely improver who just needs luck from a wide alley to be in the finish. EMBOLDEN (9) had been working towards a win and it came last start in a BM55 over today's journey at Kilcoy. Enjoys a soft run from an inside draw so another bold display looks on the cards. DO WHAT I SAY (11) returned a good figure two back when runner-up over this trip at Warwick. Best 1200m form stacks up favourably. ODE TO BEAUTY (6) was eight weeks between runs when down the track over 1000m at the Gold Coast last Saturday. Can improve sharply with that run under the belt. The lightly raced LEBANESE (5) has trialled twice leading into this return. Worth considering.
